description: A non-profit that received a government grant is checking to see if their quarterly report was received.

nodes.task_description: Identify the non-profit organization and their specific grant.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent locates the organization's grant file.

nodes.task_description: Check the system for the status of their latest quarterly report submission.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms that the report was successfully received and is pending review.

nodes.task_description: Communicate the status to the organization.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent provides a clear status update.
